title: Recipe
description: Recipe v1 contract linking SKU, G1 Formula Version, BOM, and owner approval. Recipe G1 must be approved before complete Product Activation.
$comment: Sources: PACK-02 Recipe/BOM/Formula Version registry. TODO: source documents do not define a separate recipe line schema beyond formula/BOM line concepts.

recipe_version.description: Recipe version label, usually aligned with G1 for operational use.

formula_version_id.description: Formula Version used by the recipe.

effective_date.description: Date when the recipe becomes effective.
